description: Premium design systems and modern frontend components based on Anthropic, Vercel, and Google Labs standards.
best_practices: Use modern typography: Inter, Roboto, or Outfit from Google Fonts.
Implement vibrant, harmonious color palettes (HSL); avoid plain red/blue/green.
Design for dark mode by default with elegant glassmorphism effects.
Use smooth gradients and subtle micro-animations for interactive elements.
Build with shadcn/ui components for consistency and high performance.
Prioritize mobile-first responsiveness and high Core Web Vitals.
Ensure fast page load times through asset optimization (Next.js Image).
